features.name: assignVariable
features.signature: export const assignVariable = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.initEntities is Query; annotation definition.mode is VariableMode; if (definition.mode == VariableMode.ASSIGNED) annotation
features.description: Feature performing a `setVariable` allowing a user to assign a FeatureScript value to a context variable. This variable may be retrieved within a feature by calling `getVariable`, or in a Part Studio using `#` syntax (e.g. `#foo`) inside any parameter which allows an expression (including the `value` parameter of another variable!)

fields.name: angleValue
fields.label: Value
fields.description: Used if variableType is ANGLE.

fields.name: axis
fields.description: Axis to measure distance along.

fields.name: componentSelector
fields.label: Value to record
fields.description: Select an axis to measure along.

fields.name: customDirection
fields.label: Custom direction
fields.description: If componentSelector is CUSTOM, a query containing geometry with a directon to measure along.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description of the variable. Maximum length of 256 characters.

fields.name: diameterEntity
fields.label: Entity
fields.description: Query for diameter mode, containing an entity to measure the diameter of. }}

fields.name: entityCouple
fields.label: Entities to measure between
fields.description: Query for distance mode, containing two entities to measure the distance between.

fields.name: extendEntities
fields.label: Extend entities
fields.description: Extend selected planes and lines out to infinity. Incompatible with maximum.

fields.name: lengthEntities
fields.label: Entities
fields.description: Query for length mode, containing entities to measure the length of.

fields.name: lengthValue
fields.label: Value
fields.description: Used if variableType is LENGTH.

fields.name: measureFromAxis
fields.label: Use axis
fields.description: Measure from the axis of geometry with an axis, rather than from the edge. Incompatible with maximum.

fields.name: measurementMode
fields.label: Measurement
fields.description: Whether to measure distance, length, or diameter.

fields.name: minmax
fields.label: Minimum/Maximum
fields.description: Whether to measure the minimum or maximum distance.

fields.name: mode
fields.label: Mode
fields.description: Whether the variable is measured, assigned or from table.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Must be an identifier.

fields.name: numberValue
fields.label: Value
fields.description: Used if variableType is NUMBER.

fields.name: radius
fields.label: Radius
fields.description: Whether to measure the radius rather than the diameter.

fields.name: variableType
fields.label: Variable type
fields.description: The type of variable. If it is not ANY, the value is restricted to be a length, angle, or number and is passed through the lengthValue, angleValue, or numberValue field, respectively.

features.name: bodyDraft
features.signature: export const bodyDraft = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation "Name" : "Preselection", "UIHint" : UIHint.ALWAYS_HIDDEN, "Filter" : BodyType.SOLID && (EntityType.BODY || EntityType.FACE || EntityType.EDGE) && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && ActiveSheetMetal.NO } definition.preselection is Query; annotation definition.selectionType is BodyDraftSelectionType;
features.description: An operation that performs an [opBodyDraft].

features.name: booleanBodies
features.signature: export const booleanBodies = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.operationType is BooleanOperationType; annotation (BodyType.SOLID || (BodyType.SHEET && ConstructionObject.NO && SketchObject.NO)) && AllowMeshGeometry.YES, "UIHint" : UIHint.ALLOW_QUERY_ORDER } definition.tools is Query; if (definition.operationType == BooleanOperationType.SUBTRACTION)
features.description: The boolean feature. Performs an [opBoolean] after a possible [opOffsetFace] if the operation is subtraction.

features.name: boundarySurface
features.signature: export const boundarySurface = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition surfaceOperationTypePredicate(definition); annotation "Driven query" : "u" ~ PROFILE_ENTITIES, "Item label template" : "[#uCondition] #uProfileEntities", "UIHint" : UIHint.COLLAPSE_ARRAY_ITEMS, "MaxNumberOfPicks" : 2 } definition.uProfilesArray is array; for (var profile in definition.uProfilesArray) isProfile(profile, "u");
features.description: Feature for testing Boundary Surface strategies

features.name: bridgingCurve
features.signature: export const bridgingCurve = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.preselectedEntities is Query; annotation definition.side1 is Query; annotation definition.match1 is BridgingCurveMatchType; if (definition.match1 != BridgingCurveMatchType.POSITION) annotation
features.description: Creates a curve between two points, optionally with matching of tangency or curvature to other curves at that point

features.name: chamfer
features.signature: export const chamfer = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation "Filter" : ((ActiveSheetMetal.NO && ((EntityType.EDGE && EdgeTopology.TWO_SIDED) || EntityType.FACE)) || (EntityType.EDGE && SheetMetalDefinitionEntityType.VERTEX)) && ConstructionObject.NO && SketchObject.NO && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES, "AdditionalBoxSelectFilter" : EntityType.EDGE } definition.entities is Query; annotation definition.chamferMethod is ChamferMethod;
features.description: The chamfer feature directly performs an [opChamfer] operation.

features.name: circularPattern
features.signature: export const circularPattern = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition patternTypePredicate(definition); annotation definition.axis is Query; annotation isAngle(definition.angle, ANGLE_360_FULL_DEFAULT_BOUNDS); annotation
features.description: Performs a body, face, or feature circular pattern. Internally, performs an [applyPattern], which in turn performs an [opPattern] or, for a feature pattern, calls the feature function.

fields.name: angle
fields.label: Angle
fields.description: The angle between each pattern instance, or the total angle spanned by the pattern if equalSpace is true. @eg 360 * degree

fields.name: axis
fields.label: Axis of pattern
fields.description: The axis of the pattern.

fields.name: booleanScope
fields.label: Merge scope
fields.description: The specified bodies to merge with.

fields.name: defaultScope
fields.label: Merge with all
fields.description: true to merge with all other bodies false to merge with booleanScope

fields.name: entities
fields.label: Entities to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is PART} The parts to pattern. @eg qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.BODY)

fields.name: equalSpace
fields.label: Equal spacing
fields.description: true for the entire pattern to lie within angle false for there to be angle between each pattern instance (default)

fields.name: faces
fields.label: Faces to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is FACE} The faces to pattern.

fields.name: instanceCount
fields.label: Instance count
fields.description: The resulting number of pattern entities, unless isCentered is true. @eg 4 to have 4 resulting pattern entities (including the seed).

fields.name: instanceFunction
fields.label: Features to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is FEATURE} The [FeatureList] of the features to pattern.

fields.name: isCentered
fields.label: Centered
fields.description: Whether to center the pattern on the seed. When set to true, instanceCount - 1 pattern entities are created in each direction around the axis. Default is false.

fields.name: operationType
fields.description: Specifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

fields.name: oppositeDirection
fields.label: Opposite direction
fields.description: true to switch the direction of the pattern around the axis.

fields.name: patternType
fields.label: Pattern type
fields.description: Specifies a PART, FEATURE, or FACE pattern. Default is PART. @autocomplete PatternType.PART

fields.name: skipInstances
fields.label: Skip instances
fields.description: Whether to exclude certain instances of the pattern.

fields.name: skippedInstances
fields.label: Instances to skip
fields.description: Which instances of the pattern to skip. Each is denoted by a single index, which may be negative if isCentered is true. [{ index: -3 }, { index: 2 }, { index: 5 }] }}

features.name: compositeCurve
features.signature: export const compositeCurve = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.edges is Query; curveApproximationPredicate(definition); } verifyNoMesh(context, definition, "edges"); definition.edges = dissolveWires(definition.edges);
features.description: Creates one or more Curves that are a combination of edges from various sources, be they parts, surfaces, sketches or other Curves.

features.name: compositePart
features.signature: export const compositePart = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.bodies is Query; annotation definition.closed is boolean; } const remainderTransform = getRemainderPatternTransform(context, "references" : definition.bodies });
features.description: Feature that creates a composite part from provided bodies. Performs an [opCreateCompositePart].

features.name: constrainedSurface
features.signature: export const constrainedSurface = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.csType is ConstrainedSurfaceType; if (definition.csType == ConstrainedSurfaceType.POINTS) annotation definition.vertices is array; for (var vertex in definition.vertices)
features.description: Constrained surface feature. Takes an arbitrary number of vertices and optional normal directions or meshes and creates a surface passing through the vertices/mesh points within a provided tolerance. ```constrainedSurface(context, id + "FG2MuQGCNLssvyp_123", { "csType" : ConstrainedSurfaceType.MESH, "vertices" : [], "meshes" : qUnion([iLEjUaBPUqVOpC_query]), "tolerance" : { 'value' : try(1 * inch), 'expression' : "1 in" }.value, "optimize" : OptimizationMethod.PERF });```

fields.name: csType
fields.label: Type
fields.description: Determines if the input is a mesh or a collection of points.

fields.name: meshes
fields.label: Mesh bodies or faces
fields.description: @requiredif{csType is ConstrainedSurfaceType.MESH} A query of mesh faces or bodies. Each mesh vertex of the query elements is on the constrained surface. "meshes" : qUnion([iLEjUaBPUqVOpC_query])

fields.name: optimize
fields.label: Optimize
fields.description: Whether to optimize for performance (OptimizationMethod.PERF) or smoothness (OptimizationMethod.SMOOTH). }}

fields.name: tolerance
fields.label: Tolerance
fields.description: Length to define how far from each vertex the constrained surface can be.

fields.name: vertices
fields.label: Vertices
fields.description: @requiredif{csType is ConstrainedSurfaceType.POINTS} An array of elements, each with a vertex on the surface to include. Optionally, specify a directional object to set the normal in the normal field, and set flipNormal to true to flip the normal. [ {"vertex": qVertex1}, {"vertex": qVertex2}, {"vertex": qVertex3, "normal": qNormal1}, {"vertex": qVertex4, "normal": qNormal2, "flipNormal": true} ]

features.name: copyPart
features.signature: export const copyPart = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.entities is Query; } const transform = identityTransform(); opPattern(context, id, "transforms" : [transform], "instanceNames" : ["1"], notFoundErrorKey("entities") : ErrorStringEnum.COPY_SELECT_PARTS });

features.name: cPlane
features.signature: export const cPlane = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation "Filter" : GeometryType.PLANE || EntityType.VERTEX || QueryFilterCompound.ALLOWS_AXIS || EntityType.EDGE || BodyType.MATE_CONNECTOR || AllowMeshGeometry.YES, "UIHint" : UIHint.PREVENT_CREATING_NEW_MATE_CONNECTORS } definition.entities is Query; annotation definition.cplaneType is CPlaneType; if (definition.cplaneType == CPlaneType.OFFSET)
features.description: Creates a construction plane feature by calling [opPlane].

features.name: cPoint
features.signature: export const cPoint = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.pointType is PointType; if (definition.pointType == PointType.EDGE_POINT) // Define the parameters of the feature type. Since the cpoint only takes a single edge I will call it edge // for UI purposes but for future compatibility I will call the item map entry 'entities' annotation definition.entities is Query;

features.name: cube
features.signature: export const cube = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation isLength(definition.sideLength, NONNEGATIVE_LENGTH_BOUNDS); } var remainingTransform = getRemainderPatternTransform(context, definition.corner1 = vector(0, 0, 0) * meter; definition.corner2 = vector(1, 1, 1) * definition.sideLength; fCuboid(context, id, definition); transformResultIfNecessary(context, id, remainingTransform);
features.description: Create a cube of a specified size, with one corner on the origin.

fields.name: sideLength
fields.label: Side length
fields.description: @eg 1 * inch }}

features.name: curvePattern
features.signature: export const curvePattern = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition patternTypePredicate(definition); annotation definition.edges is Query; annotation definition.spacingType is CurvePatternSpacingType; if (definition.spacingType == CurvePatternSpacingType.DISTANCE)
features.description: Performs a body, face, or feature curve pattern. Internally, performs an [applyPattern], which in turn performs an [opPattern] or, for a feature pattern, calls the feature function.

fields.name: booleanScope
fields.label: Merge scope
fields.description: The specified bodies to merge with.

fields.name: defaultScope
fields.label: Merge with all
fields.description: true to merge with all other bodies false to merge with booleanScope

fields.name: distance
fields.label: Distance
fields.description: @requiredif{spacingType is DISTANCE} The distance between each pattern entity. @eg 1.0 * inch to space the pattern entities 1 inch apart.

fields.name: edges
fields.label: Path to pattern along
fields.description: A [Query] for a set of edges to pattern along. The edges must form a continuous path.

fields.name: entities
fields.label: Entities to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is PART} The parts to pattern. @eg qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.BODY)

fields.name: faces
fields.label: Faces to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is FACE} The faces to pattern.

fields.name: instanceCount
fields.label: Instance count
fields.description: The resulting number of pattern entities. @eg 2 to have 2 resulting pattern entities (including the seed).

fields.name: instanceFunction
fields.label: Features to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is FEATURE} The [FeatureList] of the features to pattern.

fields.name: keepOrientation
fields.description: true for the pattern entities to keep the orientation of the seed false for the pattern entities to reorient along the path (default)

fields.name: operationType
fields.description: Specifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

fields.name: patternType
fields.label: Pattern type
fields.description: Specifies a PART, FEATURE, or FACE pattern. Default is PART. @autocomplete PatternType.PART

fields.name: skipInstances
fields.label: Skip instances
fields.description: Whether to exclude certain instances of the pattern.

fields.name: skippedInstances
fields.label: Instances to skip
fields.description: Which instances of the pattern to skip. Each is denoted by a single positive index. [{ index: 2 }, { index: 5 }] }}

fields.name: spacingType
fields.label: Spacing type
fields.description: Specifies the type of spacing between pattern entities. Default is EQUAL. @autocomplete CurvePatternSpacingType.EQUAL

features.name: cutlist
features.signature: export const cutlist = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.selectAllFrames is boolean; if (!definition.selectAllFrames) // BEL-172690: add filter for frames annotation "Name" : "Frames", "Filter" : (EntityType.BODY && BodyType.SOLID) || BodyType.COMPOSITE
features.description: Create a cut list from a set of frame selections.

features.name: decal
features.signature: export const decal = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.image is ImageData; annotation "Filter" : EntityType.FACE && (GeometryType.PLANE || GeometryType.CYLINDER) && SketchObject.NO && ConstructionObject.NO && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES, "MaxNumberOfPicks": 1 } definition.face is Query; annotation

features.name: deleteBodies
features.signature: export const deleteBodies = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.compositePartOption is CompositePartDeleteOptions; if (definition.compositePartOption != CompositePartDeleteOptions.IGNORE) annotation "Filter" : EntityType.BODY && AllowMeshGeometry.YES && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && SketchObject.NO } definition.entities is Query; }
features.description: Feature performing an [opDeleteBodies].

features.name: deleteFace
features.signature: export const deleteFace = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation "UIHint" : UIHint.SHOW_CREATE_SELECTION, "Filter" : (EntityType.FACE) && ConstructionObject.NO && SketchObject.NO && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && AllowMeshGeometry.YES } definition.deleteFaces is Query; annotation definition.healType is DeleteFaceType; annotation
features.description: Feature performing an [opDeleteFace]. Has options to heal the void created by removing the selected faces, or to leave it open.

features.name: derivedMirror
features.signature: export const derivedMirror = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation "UIHint" : [UIHint.READ_ONLY, UIHint.UNCONFIGURABLE] } definition.partStudio is PartStudioData; } if (definition.partStudio.buildFunction == undefined) throw regenError(ErrorStringEnum.IMPORT_DERIVED_NO_PARTS, ["partStudio"]); }

features.name: draft
features.signature: export const draft = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.draftFeatureType is DraftFeatureType; if (definition.draftFeatureType == DraftFeatureType.NEUTRAL_PLANE) annotation "Filter" : QueryFilterCompound.ALLOWS_PLANE, "MaxNumberOfPicks" : 1 } definition.neutralPlane is Query;
features.description: Feature performing an [opDraft].

fields.name: alongPull
fields.label: Switch face
fields.description: Specifies which face will be drafted in a ONE_SIDED PARTING_LINE draft. If true, the face which is more along the pull direction from the perspective of the parting edge is drafted. If false, the face which is more away from the pull direction from the perspective of the parting edge is drafted.

fields.name: angle
fields.label: Draft angle
fields.description: The draft angle, must be between 0 and 89.9 degrees. @eg 3 * degree

fields.name: draftFaces
fields.label: Entities to draft
fields.description: The faces to draft for a NEUTRAL_PLANE draft. @autocomplete draftFaces

fields.name: draftFeatureType
fields.label: Draft type
fields.description: Specifies a NEUTRAL_PLANE or PARTING_LINE draft. Default is NEUTRAL_PLANE.

fields.name: hintFaces
fields.description: For Onshape internal use. For PARTING_LINE draft, specifies in advance which adjacent faces of partingEdges should be treated as more along the pull direction. When unspecified, the feature will use a geometric calculation to determine this distinction.

fields.name: neutralPlane
fields.label: Neutral plane
fields.description: A planar face or mate connector defining both the neutral plane and pull direction of the the draft. The intersection of the drafted faces and the neutral plane remains unchanged. The pull direction of the draft will be the face normal or mate connector z-axis. @autocomplete neutralPlane

fields.name: partingEdges
fields.label: Parting edges
fields.description: Edges defining the parting line of the draft. These edges will remain unchanged as some adjacent faces, as defined by partingLineSides, are drafted.

fields.name: partingLineSides
fields.label: Sides
fields.description: Specifies whether to draft one or both faces adjacent to the parting edges, and whether the draft should be symmetrical if drafting both faces. See [PartingLineSides].

fields.name: pullDirection
fields.label: Opposite direction
fields.description: Whether the pull direction of the draft should be reversed. In equivalent terms, whether the draft should use -angle as the draft angle (true), or angle as the draft angle (false). Default is false.

fields.name: pullDirectionEntity
fields.label: Pull direction
fields.description: An entity defining the pull direction of the draft. This entity should conform to the ALLOWS_DIRECTION specification in [QueryFilterCompound].

fields.name: referenceEdgePropagation
fields.label: Parting line propagation
fields.description: For a PARTING_LINE draft, true to extend the parting line across connected edges of already included faces and tangent faces. Default is false.

fields.name: reFillet
fields.label: Reapply fillet
fields.description: true to attempt to defillet draft faces before the draft and reapply the fillets after. Default is false. }}

fields.name: secondAngle
fields.label: Second draft angle
fields.description: The second draft angle for a TWO_SIDED PARTING_LINE draft. Must be between 0 and 89.9 degrees. Note that when using TWO_SIDED, angle will be applied to faces that are away from the pull direction, from the perspective of the edge. secondAngle will be applied to faces that are along the pull direction, from the perspective of the edge. 3 * degree

fields.name: secondPullDirection
fields.label: Opposite direction
fields.description: Whether the pull direction of the draft should be reversed for the second angle of a TWO_SIDED draft. In equivalent terms, whether the draft should use -secondAngle as the second draft angle (true), or secondAngle as the second draft angle (false). Default is false.

fields.name: tangentPropagation
fields.label: Tangent propagation
fields.description: For a NEUTRAL_PLANE draft, true to propagate draft across tangent faces. Default is false.

features.name: dummyFeature
features.signature: export const dummyFeature = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition } });

features.name: editCurve
features.signature: export const editCurve = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.wire is Query; annotation definition.approximate is boolean; annotation if (definition.approximate)
features.description: A curve editing feature.

features.name: enclose
features.signature: export const enclose = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition booleanStepTypePredicate(definition); annotation definition.entities is Query; if (definition.operationType != NewBodyOperationType.NEW) booleanStepScopePredicate(definition); }
features.description: Feature performing an [opEnclose].

features.name: endcap
features.signature: export const endcap = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.faces is Query; annotation definition.profileType is ProfileType; annotation isLength(definition.thickness, OFFSET_BOUNDS);
features.description: Construct a endcap.

features.name: extendSurface
features.signature: export const extendSurface = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation (EntityType.EDGE && EdgeTopology.ONE_SIDED)) &&
features.description: Extends a surface body by calling [opExtendSheetBody].

features.name: externalThread
features.signature: export const externalThread = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.entities is Query; annotation definition.branchOfStandard is LookupTablePath; annotation definition.depthType is DepthType; if (definition.depthType == DepthType.Blind)
features.description: Given a list of edge or selections and an optional offset, find the cylindrical faces corresponding to them split the face at the offset, and add external thread size data.

features.name: extrude
features.signature: export const extrude = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.domain is OperationDomain; if (definition.domain != OperationDomain.FLAT) annotation definition.bodyType is ExtendedToolBodyType; if (definition.bodyType != ExtendedToolBodyType.SURFACE)
features.description: Create an extrude, as used in Onshape's extrude feature. Internally, performs an [opExtrude], followed by an [opBoolean], possibly followed by a [opDraft], possibly in two directions. If creating a simple extrusion, prefer using [opExtrude] alone.

fields.name: bodyType
fields.label: Creation type
fields.description: Specifies a SOLID or SURFACE or THIN extrude. Default is SOLID.

fields.name: booleanScope
fields.description: The specified bodies to merge with.

fields.name: defaultScope
fields.description: true to merge with all other bodies false to merge with booleanScope

fields.name: depth
fields.description: A length specifying the extrude depth. For a blind extrude, specifies the depth of the first extrude direction. For a symmetric extrude, specifies the full extrude depth. @eg 0.5 * inch

fields.name: draftAngle
fields.description: The angle, as measured from the extrude direction, at which to draft. 10 * degree

fields.name: draftPullDirection
fields.description: false to draft outwards (default) true to draft inwards

fields.name: endBound
fields.description: The end bounding condition for the extrude. Default is BLIND. @autocomplete BoundingType.BLIND

fields.name: endBoundEntityBody
fields.description: Specifies the surface or solid body to bound the extrude.

fields.name: endBoundEntityFace
fields.description: Specifies the face or surface to bound the extrude.

fields.name: endBoundEntityVertex
fields.description: Specifies the vertex to bound the extrude.

fields.name: entities
fields.label: Faces and sketch regions to extrude
fields.description: The planar faces and/or sketch regions to extrude. @eg qSketchRegion(id + "sketch1") specifies all sketch regions of a given sketch.

fields.name: flipWall
fields.label: Flip wall
fields.description: true to apply the first offset value instead of the second and vice versa }}

fields.name: hasDraft
fields.description: true to add a draft to the extrude.

fields.name: hasOffset
fields.description: true to add a translational offset from the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex.

fields.name: hasSecondDirection
fields.description: @example true to specify a second direction.

fields.name: hasSecondDirectionDraft
fields.description: true to add a draft to the second direction extrude.

fields.name: hasSecondDirectionOffset
fields.description: true to add a translational offset from the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex.

fields.name: offsetDistance
fields.description: The translational distance between the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex and the cap of the extrude. 0.5 * inch

fields.name: offsetOppositeDirection
fields.description: false to offset away from the selected end bound (default) true to offset into the selected end bound

fields.name: operationType
fields.label: Result body operation type
fields.description: Specifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

fields.name: oppositeDirection
fields.description: true to flip the direction of the extrude to point opposite the face/sketch normal.

fields.name: secondDirectionBound
fields.description: The bounding type of the second direction. Can be different from the bounding type of the first direction.

fields.name: secondDirectionBoundEntityBody
fields.description: specifies the surface or solid body to bound the extrude.

fields.name: secondDirectionBoundEntityFace
fields.description: specifies the face or surface to bound the extrude.

fields.name: secondDirectionBoundEntityVertex
fields.description: specifies the vertex to bound the extrude.

fields.name: secondDirectionDepth
fields.description: A length specifying the second direction's extrude depth.

fields.name: secondDirectionDraftPullDirection
fields.description: false to draft the second direction outwards (default) true to draft the second direction inwards

fields.name: secondDirectionOffsetDistance
fields.description: The translational distance between the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex and the cap of the extrude. 0.5 * inch

fields.name: secondDirectionOffsetOppositeDirection
fields.description: false to offset away from the selected second direction end bound (default) true to offset into the selected second direction end bound

fields.name: secondDirectionOppositeDirection
fields.description: true will flip the second end direction to align opposite the plane/face's normal.

fields.name: surfaceEntities
fields.label: Sketch curves to extrude
fields.description: The sketch curves to extrude. @example qCreatedBy(id + "sketch1", EntityType.EDGE)

fields.name: thickness1
fields.label: Thickness 1
fields.description: The outwards thickness of the thin wall.

fields.name: thickness2
fields.label: Thickness 2
fields.description: The inwards thickness of the thin wall.

fields.name: wallShape
fields.label: Faces and sketch regions to extrude
fields.description: The specified planar face or sketch edges defining the thin wall shape.

features.name: faceBlend
features.signature: export const faceBlend = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation "Filter" : EntityType.FACE && ConstructionObject.NO && SketchObject.NO && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && ActiveSheetMetal.NO } definition.side1 is Query; annotation definition.flipSide1 is boolean; annotation "Filter" : EntityType.FACE && ConstructionObject.NO && SketchObject.NO && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && ActiveSheetMetal.NO }
features.description: Feature performing a face blend.

fields.name: crossSectionShape
fields.label: Control
fields.description: Cross sectional control

features.name: fakeExtrude

features.name: fCone

fields.name: brokenOutEndConditions

fields.name: isBrokenOut

fields.name: keepSketches

fields.name: offsetPoints
fields.description: Array of points for offsetting the section lines.

fields.name: sketchPlane

features.name: linearPattern
features.signature: export const linearPattern = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition patternTypePredicate(definition); annotation "Filter" : QueryFilterCompound.ALLOWS_DIRECTION, "MaxNumberOfPicks" : 1 } definition.directionOne is Query; annotation isLength(definition.distance, PATTERN_OFFSET_BOUND);
features.description: Performs a body, face, or feature linear pattern. Internally, performs an [applyPattern], which in turn performs an [opPattern] or, for a feature pattern, calls the feature function.

fields.name: booleanScope
fields.label: Merge scope
fields.description: The specified bodies to merge with.

fields.name: defaultScope
fields.label: Merge with all
fields.description: true to merge with all other bodies false to merge with booleanScope

fields.name: directionOne
fields.label: Direction
fields.description: The direction of the pattern. @eg qCreatedBy(newId() + "Right", EntityType.FACE)

fields.name: directionTwo
fields.label: Direction
fields.description: @requiredif{hasSecondDir is true} The second direction of the pattern.

fields.name: distance
fields.label: Distance
fields.description: The distance between each pattern entity. @eg 1.0 * inch to space the pattern entities 1 inch apart.

fields.name: distanceTwo
fields.label: Distance
fields.description: @requiredif{hasSecondDir is true} The distance between each pattern entity in the second direction.

fields.name: entities
fields.label: Entities to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is PART} The parts to pattern. @eg qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.BODY)

fields.name: faces
fields.label: Faces to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is FACE} The faces to pattern.

fields.name: hasSecondDir
fields.label: Second direction
fields.description: true if the pattern should extend in two directions rather than one, creating a grid of pattern entities.

fields.name: instanceCount
fields.label: Instance count
fields.description: The resulting number of pattern entities, unless isCentered is true. @eg 2 to have 2 resulting pattern entities (including the seed).

fields.name: instanceCountTwo
fields.label: Instance count
fields.description: @requiredif{hasSecondDir is true} The resulting number of pattern entities in the second direction, unless isCentered is true.

fields.name: instanceFunction
fields.label: Features to pattern
fields.description: @requiredif{patternType is FEATURE} The [FeatureList] of the features to pattern.

fields.name: isCentered
fields.label: Centered
fields.description: Whether to center the pattern on the seed. When set to true, instanceCount - 1 pattern entities are created along each direction of directionOne. Default is false.

fields.name: isCenteredTwo
fields.label: Centered
fields.description: Whether to center the second direction of the pattern on the seed. When set to true, instanceCount - 1 pattern entities are created along each direction of directionTwo. Default is false.

fields.name: operationType
fields.description: Specifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

fields.name: oppositeDirection
fields.label: Opposite direction
fields.description: true to switch the direction of the pattern along directionOne.

fields.name: oppositeDirectionTwo
fields.label: Opposite direction
fields.description: true to switch the direction of the pattern along directionTwo.

fields.name: patternType
fields.label: Pattern type
fields.description: Specifies a PART, FEATURE, or FACE pattern. Default is PART. @autocomplete PatternType.PART

fields.name: skipInstances
fields.label: Skip instances
fields.description: Whether to exclude certain instances of the pattern.

fields.name: skippedInstances
fields.label: Instances to skip
fields.description: Which instances of the pattern to skip. Each is denoted by one index for each direction, either of which may be negative if isCentered or isCenteredTwo respectively is true. [{ index1: -3, index2: 1 }, { index1: 0, index2: -2 }, { index1: 5, index2: 0 }] }}

features.description: Feature performing an [opLoft].

features.name: mateConnector

features.description: Feature performing an [opMateConnector]. The parameters below are designed for interactive use in the feature dialog. In FeatureScript, it is preferred to calculate the resulting coordinate system directly, and pass this coordinate system to `opMateConnector`.

fields.name: entityInferenceType
fields.description: A method of producing the coordinate system @eg EntityInferenceType.POINT to place on a vertex, with the world coordinate system EntityInferenceType.MID_POINT to place at the midpoint of an edge, with the Z axis along the edge

fields.name: flipPrimary
fields.label: Flip primary axis
fields.description: true to flip the resulting Z axis

fields.name: nx
fields.label: Normal x
fields.description: @requiredIf {specifyNormal is true}

fields.name: ny
fields.label: Normal y
fields.description: @requiredIf {specifyNormal is true}

fields.name: nz
fields.label: Normal z
fields.description: @requiredIf {specifyNormal is true} }}

fields.name: originAdditionalQuery
fields.label: Between entity
fields.description: @requiredIf {originType is OriginCreationType.BETWEEN_ENTITIES}

fields.name: originQuery
fields.label: Origin entity
fields.description: The entity on which to place the mate connector qFarthestAlong(qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.VERTEX), vector(1, 1, 1))

fields.name: originType
fields.label: Origin type
fields.description: OriginCreationType.BETWEEN_ENTITIES to place mate connector origin on the midpoint between the speicified origin and the location of originAdditionalQuery. Default is OriginCreationType.ON_ENTITY.

fields.name: ownerPart
fields.label: Select owner entity
fields.description: @requiredIf {requireOwnerPart is not false} Part on which to attach the resulting mate connector @autocomplete ownerPart

fields.name: primaryAxisQuery
fields.label: Primary axis entity
fields.description: @requiredIf {realign is true} Entity with axis to define the resulting Z direction

fields.name: realign
fields.label: Realign
fields.description: true to change direction of axes

fields.name: requireOwnerPart
fields.label: Owner entity
fields.description: Whether to error if owner part is not provided. Default is true. If false, the mate connector may be an independent body with no owner part.

fields.name: rotation
fields.label: Rotation angle
fields.description: Angle to rotate

fields.name: rotationType
fields.label: Rotation axis
fields.description: Axis to rotate around (does not change origin position)

fields.name: secondaryAxisQuery
fields.label: Secondary axis entity
fields.description: @requiredIf {realign is true} Entity with axis to define the secondary axis (set by secondaryAxisType)

fields.name: secondaryAxisType
fields.label: Reorient secondary axis
fields.description: Changes which axis (perpendicular to Z) will point along the secondary direction. Default is MateConnectorAxisType.PLUS_X

fields.name: secondaryOriginQuery
fields.description: Additional entity to inference with, used in some inference types.

fields.name: specifyNormal
fields.label: Specify normal
fields.description: true override the Z direction with the known vector (definition.nx, definition.ny, definition.nz). Used internally when the mate connector is placed on a mesh.

fields.name: transform
fields.label: Move
fields.description: Whether to change the origin position with translationX, translationY, and translationZ. The X/Y/Z directions of this translation are affected by primaryAxisQuery and secondaryAxisQuery and secondaryAxisType, but not by rotationType and rotation

fields.name: translationX
fields.label: X translation
fields.description: @requiredIf {transform is true} Distance to move the resulting origin along resulting X direction.

fields.name: translationY
fields.label: Y translation
fields.description: @requiredIf {transform is true} Distance to move the resulting origin along resulting Y direction

fields.name: translationZ
fields.label: Z translation
fields.description: @requiredIf {transform is true} Distance to move the resulting origin along resulting Z direction

features.name: queryVariable
features.signature: export const queryVariable = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.name is string; annotation definition.description is string; initialQueryPredicate(definition); annotation
features.description: Feature to create a query variable via calling `setQueryVariable`. This variable may be used in featurescript via call `getQueryVariable` or in the UI by clicking the "Variable selection" dropdown in the feature dialog or by selecting the query variable feature in the feature list.

fields.name: addAdditionalQueries
fields.label: Add additional queries
fields.description: Whether to include addition queries in the variable.

fields.name: additionalQueries
fields.label: Additional queries
fields.description: An array of additional queries to include. Each item's content is analogous to what is contained in the original query. It also contains a booleanOperation field determining how to combine the additional query with the current query.

fields.name: boundedFacesBounds
fields.label: Bounds
fields.description: If selectionType is BOUNDED_FACES, the faces or edges bounding the selection.

fields.name: createdByFeatures
fields.label: Created by features
fields.description: If selectionType is CREATED_BY, features whose created entities will be contained in the variable.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description of the variable. Maximum length of 256 characters.

fields.name: edgeConvexityType
fields.label: Edge convexity type
fields.description: If selectionType is EDGE_CONVEXITY, the convexity type of edges to include in the variable.

fields.name: entityType
fields.label: Entity type
fields.description: If selectionType is CREATED_BY or OWNED_BY, the entity type to include in the variable.

fields.name: evaluateOnUse
fields.label: Evaluate on use
fields.description: Whether to evaluate the variable when it is created or when it is used.

fields.name: filletCompareType
fields.label: Fillet compare type
fields.description: If selectionType is FILLETS, the type of fillets to include in the variable.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: The name of the feature. Must not belong to a non-query variable feature. If a query variable feature with this name exists, it will be overwritten after this feature.

fields.name: seedBodies
fields.label: Entities
fields.description: If selectionType is OWNED_BY or EDGE_CONVEXITY, bodies owning the entities that will be contained in the variable.

fields.name: seedEdgesOrFaces
fields.label: Edges or faces
fields.description: If selectionType is LOOP_CHAIN_CONNECTED, faces or edges from which the loops are computed.

fields.name: seedFaces
fields.label: Faces
fields.description: If selectionType is PROTRUSION or POCKET or HOLE or FILLETS or BOUNDED_FACES, or TANGENT_CONNECTED or MATCHING and seedType is FACE, faces from which the selection is created.

fields.name: seedType
fields.label: Entity type
fields.description: If the selection type allows edges or faces, selects the seed type.

fields.name: selectionQuery
fields.label: Selections
fields.description: If selectionType is SELECTION, query that will be contained in the variable.

fields.name: selectionType
fields.label: Selection type
fields.description: The type of selection the initial query will hold.

fields.name: showSelection
fields.label: Show selection
fields.description: Whether to highlight the entities contained in the created variable. }}

features.name: replaceFace
features.signature: export const replaceFace = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation "UIHint" : UIHint.SHOW_CREATE_SELECTION, "Filter" : (EntityType.FACE) && ConstructionObject.NO && SketchObject.NO && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && AllowMeshGeometry.YES } definition.replaceFaces is Query; annotation definition.templateFace is Query; annotation
features.description: Feature performing an [opReplaceFace].

features.name: revolve
features.signature: export const revolve = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.bodyType is ExtendedToolBodyType; if (definition.bodyType != ExtendedToolBodyType.SURFACE) booleanStepTypePredicate(definition); } else
features.description: Feature performing an [opRevolve], followed by an [opBoolean]. For simple revolves, prefer using [opRevolve] directly.

fields.name: endBoundEntityVertex
fields.label: Up to vertex or mate connector

fields.name: entities
fields.label: Faces and sketch regions to revolve

fields.name: startBoundEntityVertex
fields.label: Up to vertex or mate connector

fields.name: surfaceEntities
fields.label: Edges and sketch curves to revolve

fields.name: wallShape
fields.label: Faces and sketch regions to revolve

features.name: rib
features.signature: export const rib = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.profiles is Query; annotation definition.parts is Query; annotation isLength(definition.thickness, SHELL_OFFSET_BOUNDS);
features.description: Creates ribs from selected profiles. The ribs can be either free standing or merged with their mating part. Profiles must be non-construction sketch edges.

fields.name: draftAngle
fields.label: Draft angle
fields.description: The angle of the draft with respect to the extruded direction of the rib. 10 * degree

fields.name: draftPullDirection
fields.description: false to draft outwards (default) true to draft inwards

fields.name: extendProfilesUpToPart
fields.label: Extend profiles to part
fields.description: Whether the ribs are extruded up to a boundary part.

fields.name: hasDraft
fields.label: Draft
fields.description: true to add a draft to the rib.

fields.name: mergeRibs
fields.label: Merge ribs
fields.description: Whether the ribs are merged with the mating part. }}

fields.name: oppositeDirection
fields.label: Opposite direction
fields.description: Whether the ribs are extruded in the positive or negative direction.

fields.name: parts
fields.label: Parts
fields.description: Parts which form the boundary of the ribs.

fields.name: profiles
fields.label: Sketch profiles
fields.description: Edges which form the center lines of the ribs.

fields.name: ribExtrusionDirection
fields.label: Rib extrusion direction
fields.description: Whether the rib is extruded perpendicular or parallel to the plane.

fields.name: thickness
fields.label: Thickness
fields.description: Thickness of the ribs.

features.name: routingCurve
features.signature: export const routingCurve = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.preselectedEntities is Query; annotation definition.curveType is RoutingCurveType; if (definition.curveType == RoutingCurveType.POLYLINE) annotation
features.description: Creates a routing curve feature.

features.name: ruledSurface
features.signature: export const ruledSurface = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition surfaceOperationTypePredicate(definition); annotation definition.edges is Query; annotation definition.ruledType is RuledSurfaceInterfaceType; if (isAlignedType(definition))
features.description: Feature creating a ruled surface.

fields.name: boundaryOverride
fields.label: Up to vertex or mate connector

features.name: sectionPart
features.signature: export const sectionPart = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition definition.targets is Query; definition.plane is Plane; } retainHoleAttributes(context, definition.targets); var bodiesToDelete = qEverything(EntityType.BODY); // Delete everything if there's an error try bodiesToDelete = performSectionCutAndGetBodiesToDelete(context, id, definition.plane, definition.targets);
features.description: Feature creating a section of a part behind a plane. Internally, performs an [opSplitPart] followed by an [opDeleteBodies]. Not exposed in the Part Studio UI.

features.signature: export const sectionTransformedParts = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition definition.targets is array; for (var target in definition.targets) target is SectionTarget; } definition.sketchPlane is Plane; definition.jogPoints is array; for (var point in definition.jogPoints)

features.name: shell
features.signature: export const shell = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.isHollow is boolean; if (!definition.isHollow) annotation "Filter" : EntityType.FACE && BodyType.SOLID && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && ActiveSheetMetal.NO && AllowMeshGeometry.YES } definition.entities is Query; }
features.description: Feature performing an [opShell].

features.name: splitPart
features.signature: export const splitPart = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.splitType is SplitType; if (definition.splitType == SplitType.PART) annotation "Filter" : EntityType.BODY && (BodyType.SOLID || BodyType.SHEET || BodyType.WIRE) && ModifiableEntityOnly.YES && AllowMeshGeometry.YES && SketchObject.NO } definition.targets is Query;
features.description: Feature performing an [opSplitPart].

fields.name: targets
fields.label: Parts, surfaces, or curves to split

features.name: sweep
features.signature: export const sweep = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.bodyType is ExtendedToolBodyType; if (definition.bodyType == ExtendedToolBodyType.SOLID || definition.bodyType == ExtendedToolBodyType.THIN) booleanStepTypePredicate(definition); } else
features.description: Feature performing an [opSweep], followed by an [opBoolean]. For simple sweeps, prefer using [opSweep] directly.

fields.label: Faces and sketch regions to sweep

fields.label: Edges and sketch curves to sweep

fields.label: Faces and sketch regions to sweep

features.name: tag
features.signature: export const tag = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.tagPurpose is TagPurpose; if (definition.tagPurpose == TagPurpose.FRAME) annotation definition.sketch is FeatureList; annotation
features.description: Tag an entity with metadata. The metadata will be used for formed and frame features.

fields.name: cSysMateConnector
fields.label: Form origin mate connector
fields.description: If none selected, this feature will create one at Origin

features.name: thicken
features.signature: export const thicken = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition booleanStepTypePredicate(definition); annotation "Filter" : (EntityType.FACE || (BodyType.SHEET && EntityType.BODY && SketchObject.NO)) && ConstructionObject.NO } definition.entities is Query; annotation definition.midplane is boolean;
features.description: Feature performing an [opThicken], followed by an [opBoolean]. For simple thickens, prefer using [opThicken] directly.

features.name: trimCurve
features.signature: export const trimCurve = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.moveBoundaryType is MoveCurveBoundaryType; annotation definition.wires is Query; if (definition.moveBoundaryType == MoveCurveBoundaryType.EXTEND) annotation
features.description: Extend or trim a curve. This is a thin wrapper around [opMoveCurveBoundary].

features.name: wrap
features.signature: export const wrap = defineFeature(function(context is Context, id is Id, definition is map) precondition annotation definition.resultType is WrapResultType; if (definition.resultType == WrapResultType.SOLID) booleanStepTypePredicate(definition); } annotation
